case_title: TINGO, JR., GEORGE vs. STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING ON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT BY DEFT. GRANTED - 6 - QUIDACHAY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TINGO, JR., GEORGE
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM OCT-26-1994 TO NOV-16-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER DISMISSING CASE PURSUANT TO RELEASE & SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT RELEASE AND SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT; ORDER DIMISSING CASE FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT THAT THE COMPLAINT AGAINST DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT IS DISMISSED. PARTIES SHALL BEAR OWN COSTS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF NOV-16-1994, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED 11/9/94.
